title: Business / ZZP entry points
intro: Neutral links toward business banking lanes — compare transaction bundles, bookkeeping exports, and fees on each bank’s business tariff, not the personal homepage.

items.reason: ING business pages describe self-employed and company products separately from retail — start from the business price list.
ABN AMRO publishes SME / ZZP account options — confirm KvK requirements and included transactions.
bunq markets business tiers alongside personal plans — check whether your activity fits their business terms.

disclosure: Some links may be affiliate or referral links. If you use them, we may earn a commission at no extra cost to you. Ordering reflects page relevance, not pay-to-rank placement. Always confirm scope, pricing, and terms with the provider directly.
